ideas.name: Revenue Clone Detector
ideas.tagline: Find which competitors are actually making money
ideas.description: Enter a startup name. We analyze their pricing, pitch, and market positioning. Give you a revenue estimate and how they make it.

ideas.name: Contract Generator
ideas.description: Answer 5 questions. Get a legally-reviewed contract PDF. Built for indie consultants and freelancers.

ideas.name: Micro SaaS Checker
ideas.tagline: Is your SaaS idea viable? Get a report in 2 minutes.
ideas.description: Answer 10 questions about your SaaS idea. Get a viability score + market size estimate + competition analysis.

ideas.name: Cold Email Template Generator
ideas.tagline: 5-email sequence for any industry in 60 seconds
ideas.description: Select industry + goal. Get personalized email sequence with subject lines, body, and follow-up timing.

ideas.name: Landing Page A/B Tester
ideas.tagline: Test 3 headlines against each other in 1 minute
ideas.description: Enter 3 headlines. Get a shareable link. People vote. You see which wins.
